macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Indexes Slip on Tuesday Amid Middle East Tensions
items.summary: The S&P 500 fell 0.4% to 6,556.37, Dow dropped 0.2% to 46,124.06, and Nasdaq declined 0.8% to 21,761.89, giving back prior gains as attacks continued in the war with Iran. The Russell 2000 bucked the trend, rising 0.4% to 2,505.44.

items.title: Stocks Decline as Middle East Conflict Escalates
items.summary: Major US indexes fell on March 24 after Monday's recovery, with Dow down 84 points (-0.18%) and Russell 2000 up 0.45%, driven by renewed concerns over the Iran conflict. Oil prices rebounded while Treasury yields rose.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Western Union Launches USDPT Stablecoin on Solana Blockchain
items.summary: Western Union has unveiled USDPT, a new stablecoin built on the Solana blockchain, aimed at revolutionizing money transfers. CEO Devin McGranahan announced this development on Fox Business.

items.title: Bitcoin Dips to $68,000 Amid Stablecoin Regulatory Concerns
items.summary: Bitcoin dropped to the $68,000 range yesterday due to negative news on stablecoins like Tether and USDC related to the Clarity Act, but is bouncing back today. Analysts warn of potential further downside to $50,000 if key trendline breaks.

items.title: TAO Token Surges Over 100% in One Month with Massive Volumes
items.summary: The TAO token, linked to AI, has risen more than 100% in the past month amid extraordinary trading volumes. Discussion ties this to broader crypto momentum excluding BTC, ETH, and stablecoins.

items.title: Elon Musk Announces X Money Launch in April and SpaceX IPO
items.summary: Elon Musk plans to launch X Money in April and SpaceX's largest-ever IPO, potentially impacting crypto as SpaceX holds Bitcoin in its treasury. This coincides with xAI developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: ITU Announces AI for Good Global Summit in Geneva for July 2026
items.summary: The International Telecommunication Union (ITU) will host the seventh AI for Good Global Summit from July 7-10, 2026, in Geneva, featuring live demos of agentic AI, edge AI, brain-computer interfaces, robotics, and discussions on AI governance, standards, and national strategies.

items.title: Pacific Defense Launches AI-Enabled Digital Signal Processor
items.summary: Pacific Defense has launched a next-generation AI-enabled digital signal processor designed for mission systems, marking a new advancement in AI hardware for defense applications.

items.title: DORA Discusses AI Integration in Research Funding Lifecycle
items.summary: Research funding organizations gathered by DORA explored AI applications across funding stages, including program establishment, decision-making, and evaluation, emphasizing efficiency balanced with integrity and equity.

items.title: Loeb & Loeb's 2026 AI Summit Highlights Data Management Challenges
items.summary: At Loeb & Loeb’s 2026 AI Summit, experts discussed balancing AI innovation with data privacy, security risks, and reliability issues like hallucinations in AI outputs across industries.

items.title: 2026 Predicted as Year of Physical Intelligence in AI
items.summary: Analysts predict 2026 will see AI shift to physical intelligence, with robots learning like humans via few-shot learning, context-aware sensing, and AI designing its own successors through automated pipelines.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: AMD Releases Ryzen AI 400 Series Processors for Copilot+ PCs
items.summary: AMD launched the Ryzen AI 400 series on March 25, featuring Zen 5 CPU cores, RDNA 3.5 graphics, and XDNA 2 NPU with up to 60 TOPS for local processing of large models on desktop and mobile.

items.title: Apple Increases iPhone Production in India to 25% of Total
items.summary: Apple has shifted production so that about 25% of its iPhones are now manufactured in India following its pivot away from China.

items.title: China's Chip Industry Sees Accelerated Growth from Global Demand
items.summary: China's semiconductor sector is expanding rapidly due to surging demand for chips in cars, smartphones, and electronics, projected to reach 42% of global mature node capacity by 2028.
